name: radiant-protocol
description: Radiant Protocol – Smart contracts and deployment scripts

scripts.deploy:sepolia: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/RadiantDeploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/RadiantDeploy.ts --network mainnet
scripts.deploy:arbitrum: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/RadiantDeploy.ts --network arbitrum
